description_long: This is a compact, four-door sedan with a boxy, vintage design reminiscent of late 20th-century European cars. The body is primarily a weathered, dark gray metal with visible signs of wear and rust, suggesting age and frequent use. The windows are tinted dark, and the car features classic chrome trim around the windows and bumpers. The headlights and taillights are rectangular, with the rear lights showing a red and amber color scheme. The wheels are small, black, and feature a simple, utilitarian design. Faint exhaust or motion blur is visible behind the car, indicating movement or recent acceleration.
description: A weathered, vintage four-door sedan in dark gray with chrome trim, tinted windows, and simple black wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular headlights, chrome bumper, and a slightly worn hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the boxy profile, four doors, and visible motion blur behind the car.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rectangular taillights, chrome bumper, and trunk details.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with clear visibility of the doors and motion blur.
attribute_wheel_design: Simple black wheels with a solid center and no visible spokes.
